services.title: Web Development
services.description: I build responsive and modern websites using React, Tailwind CSS, and WordPress. I focus on clean UI, fast performance, and mobile-first design to ensure a smooth user experience.

services.title: WordPress & WooCommerce
services.description: I create and customize WordPress websites, including WooCommerce stores with product variations, payment setup, and essential integrations like analytics and tracking tools.

services.title: UI/UX Design
services.description: I design clean and user-friendly interfaces in Figma, focusing on usability, accessibility, and converting ideas into intuitive digital experiences.

services.title: Firebase & Backend Integration
services.description: I integrate backend services using Firebase, including authentication, real-time databases, and cloud functions to support scalable web applications.

services.title: Web App Features & Systems
services.description: I develop functional systems such as dashboards, notifications, and progress tracking tools using React and modern frontend practices.

services.title: Virtual Assistance (Tech-Focused)
services.description: I assist with website updates, content management, data entry, and basic technical tasks to help streamline your workflow.
